text:
Question: Which process do plants use to make sugar from sunlight?
A. Photosynthesis
B. Evaporation
C. Fermentation
D. Condensation
label: A

text:
Question: What force pulls objects toward Earth?
A. Magnetism
B. Gravity
C. Friction
D. Buoyancy
label: B

text:
Question: Which state of matter has a fixed volume but no fixed shape?
A. Solid
B. Gas
C. Liquid
D. Plasma
label: C

text:
Question: What part of an atom has a negative charge?
A. Proton
B. Neutron
C. Nucleus
D. Electron
label: D

text:
Question: Which organ pumps blood through the body?
A. Heart
B. Lung
C. Kidney
D. Stomach
label: A

text:
Question: What gas do humans need to breathe for cellular respiration?
A. Nitrogen
B. Oxygen
C. Helium
D. Argon
label: B

text:
Question: Which tool measures temperature?
A. Barometer
B. Compass
C. Thermometer
D. Ruler
label: C

text:
Question: Which planet is known as the red planet?
A. Venus
B. Jupiter
C. Mercury
D. Mars
label: D
